name: Cathay Financial Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Cathay Financial Holding Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, provides various financial services in Taiwan. The company operates through five segments: Banking, Life Insurance, Property Insurance, Securities, and Other. It provides foreign exchange and guarantee, foreign currency investment advisory, trust, offshore banking, and other financial services. The company also offers traditional, investment-linked, and annuity insurance products; fire insurance, marine insurance, land and air insurance, liability insurance, financial guarantee insurance, reinsurance, and other insurance products; and financial planning services and policy loan services. In addition, it provides securities brokerage, discretionary and underwriting, and security financial services, as well as other financial products. Further, the company also provides real estate investment and management, wealth management, venture capital, asset management, fund management, banking, futures, risk management software, and securities investment consulting services. Cathay Financial Holding Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
